name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Find LinkedIn leads matching this target market: {target_market_description}
prompts.use_case: Sales teams automating lead sourcing and outreach on LinkedIn.

prompts.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompts.use_case: Recruiters identifying and contacting potential candidates efficiently.
